specific_question: Based on internal projections, how long will it take for MediConn to come into compliance with all U.S. state laws regarding cash-only patient privacy?
answer: MediConn's compliance team has projected that full compliance with all American state patient data privacy laws would not be able to be achieved until Q1 2027 at the earliest.
dr_question: What regulatory challenges should MediConn prepare for if it decided to expand its cash-only services into the United States?
